title: A Collection of Trained DCGAN under different settings
author: Cong Xu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: I do some ablation study about well-known tricks for training GAN, including loss functions, EMA, Diff_Aug, truncated normal, accumulative iterations per step and total steps per D training procedure. The codes are available at  here  .
steps_raw: I do some ablation study about well-known tricks for training GAN, including loss functions, EMA, Diff_Aug, truncated normal, accumulative iterations per step and total steps per D training procedure. The codes are available at  here  .
